title: Meccion Diamond Hole Saw with Pilot Center Drill Bit 25mm Diamond Core Hole Cutter for Tile, Porcelain, Glass, Marble, Ceramic
features: Diamond Core Hole Saws: Made of carbon steel with diamond coated hole saw drill bit, Ideal for drilling on tile, porcelain, glass, marble, ceramic etc.
Drilling a Precise Hole: With pilot center drill bit design, Avoids the hassle of slipping and makes drilling holes in tiles easy and precise.

Longer Service Life: Thicken and uniform diamond coated provide a superior performance and longer service life, Large clearance hole on lateral side allow for water to keep cooling and remove chips faster.
Use Instructions: Keep drilling vertically, when a round slot is drilled you can remove the centring bit and continue drilling. Keep the RPM 500-800 and use water to keep it cooling for last long.
HOW WE’RE DIFFERENT: We aim to inspire customers to live a more convenient and secure lifestyle. We have a professional products monitoring team focusing on all the details.
description: MECCION continues to design and optimize professional jobsite solutions - tools, accessories and service - to ensure absolute confidence for the toughest conditions. We aim to make the best value products to live a more convenient and secure lifestyle. We have a professional products monitoring team focusing on all the details. From our proven performance to our focus on innovation and technology. The result is products we can stand behind. Meccion Diamond Core Hole Saws with Pilot Drill Bit 1. Drilling a clean hole on glass, tiles, marble, porcelain and ceramic etc. 2. With pilot drill bit to avoids the hassle of slipping and drilling a precise hole. 3. Thicken diamond coated provide a longer service life. 4. Uniform diamond coated provide a superior performance. 5. Clearance hole allow for water to keep hole saws cooling and remove chips faster. 6. Compatible with electric drills, cordless drills, bench drills Notes on Use: 1. Always use water for cooling, otherwise the diamond core bit will burn. 2. Remove the pilot center bit after the circular slot drilled for a long service life. 3. Reduced drill speeds, low drill pressure. 4. Hole saws are consumables and their service life will vary in different hardnesses of materials. 5. Not for use on metal, toughened glass and cannot use impact mode.
